hypothesis: Fine-tuning a direct-force pre-trained NNIP by adding an unsupervised consistency regularizer that minimizes the squared Force Delta on unlabeled, Force Delta–guided adversarially sampled configurations will reduce the median out-of-distribution force RMSE by at least 25% and at 300 K will increase the median NVE MD time-to-0.5% energy drift by at least 2× compared to fine-tuning without this regularizer on the same unlabeled data and with no additional DFT labels.
